explanations.1: This pattern uses parentheses and the pipe symbol (|) to match multiple filenames at once, like saying 'apply these rules to file_1.gif OR file_2.png'.
explanations.2: This sets the order in which Apache evaluates Allow and Deny rules, checking Allow rules first, then Deny rules.
explanations.3: This denies access from all IP addresses, effectively blocking everyone from viewing these files.
